---
title: "Teachings on the Catechism for the Little Ones. By Charlotte Mary Yonge."
---

## Teachings on the Catechism for the Little Ones. By Charlotte Mary Yonge.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1886
**Genre:** Non-fiction: theology
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: Walter Smith, 34 King Street, Covent Garden

### Notes

</i>The preface is dated 30 December 1885, and explains that these lessons had appeared originally in the <i>Monthly Paper of Sunday Teaching.</i>

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
